meta.notes: Reconciled against github.com/kraulerson on 2026-05-16. Floor = active/shipped/blocked (numbered stations). Annex = scoped/planned (proposed projects).

projects.name: Solo Orchestrator Framework
projects.tagline: AI-assisted software development methodology for solo builders.
projects.description: Five-phase methodology (Discovery → Architecture → Construction → Validation → Release) enabling a solo builder to use AI as the execution layer for production-grade software. Platform-agnostic Builder's Guide with modular Platform Modules, governance framework, project intake template, CLI setup addendum, and an evaluation prompt set. 16 GitHub stars. Active development — vendored skills system, session-handoff skill, ongoing PRs (42+ merged).
projects.current_state: v1.0+ shipped and publicly listed. Active development on vendored skills subsystem (PR #42 merged 2026-05-16).
action_items: Build web-app.yml profile (Trello clone gap)
Follow up with Steve Carpenter / Scott Cousins on CIO outreach if no response by end of May
Continue vendored skills rollout (triage, zoom-out, grill-with-docs are queued)

action_log.content: PR #42 merged — vendored skills framework + session-handoff skill (adapted from mattpocock/skills with attribution). 23/23 tests pass.
PR #41 merged — BL-029.1 S3/S4/S5 calibration follow-ups.
README updated. CIO outreach sent.

projects.name: Claude Dev Framework
projects.tagline: Universal development discipline enforcement for Claude Code.
projects.description: Hook-based development discipline enforcement that mechanically prevents Claude from rationalizing past rules. Hooks, rules, profiles, cross-project sync, discovery-driven assessment, marker-forgery detection. Wraps the Superpowers plugin as the skill engine. Currently at v4.2.5. Downstream projects refresh via scripts/cdf-refresh.sh. 8 GitHub stars.
projects.current_state: v4.2.5 in active use across all framework-discipline projects. Recent fixes: py:__future__ stdlib whitelist.
action_items: Build web-app.yml profile (same gap as Solo Orchestrator)

action_log.content: PR #3 merged — py:__future__ stdlib whitelist fix. Bumped to v4.2.5.

projects.name: MeshScope
projects.description: Cross-platform desktop 3D mesh viewer for macOS 13+, Windows 10+, Ubuntu 22.04+. Loads STL/OBJ/3MF/PLY, 3D viewport with orbit/pan/zoom, mesh info, format conversion, print-bed visualization, manifold/watertight checking, basic mesh repair, transforms, measurement tool, cross-section slice plane. Packaged via Nuitka. Built as Solo Orchestrator proof point.
action_items: Decide if mesh-to-BREP conversion is worth post-MVP investment

projects.name: K-PDF
projects.tagline: Offline cross-platform PDF reader and editor.
projects.description: Cross-platform PDF editor built as the first Solo Orchestrator proof point. Python/PySide6/PyMuPDF/Nuitka. MVP runs on Windows/macOS/Linux. Security scanning via Semgrep + gitleaks in CI. Risk Mitigation Matrix. Architecture Decision Records.
action_items: Formalize Phase 4 HANDOFF.md if anyone else may pick it up

projects.name: Tender Reminders
projects.tagline: Cross-platform relationship-wellness app — iOS TestFlight beta + Android Play closed beta with active subscribers.
projects.description: Personal habit coach that sends gentle, randomized reminders to do thoughtful things for a partner. Kotlin Multiplatform shared module for business logic, native Kotlin Android app, native Swift iOS app. Free tier runs on-device. Premium tier connects to Claude API for personalized gesture suggestions. Real subscription users on both stores. Published under Ferrum Corde LLC. Repo: reminder_app.
projects.current_state: iOS v0.26.2 build 17 on TestFlight (uploaded 2026-05-14). Android in Google Play closed beta. Real subscribers across both platforms. Recent fix: Subscription.isPremium logic for status transitions without ASSN refresh.
action_items: Define beta-to-public release exit criteria
Confirm Apple App Store Server Notification webhook is configured (the missing ASSN was the root cause of the premium-badge bug)
Plan Apple-side subscription expiry handling for the production launch
Wire StoreKit 2 fully for production

action_log.content: PR #37 — iOS v0.26.2 build 17 to TestFlight. Distributes shared Subscription.isPremium fix. ACTIVE/GIFTED status now always premium; CANCELLED checks expiresAt for grace.
Diagnostic logging removed after subscription sign-in debugging.

projects.name: Game_shelf
projects.description: Self-hosted web app showing the full game library across Steam, Epic, Ubisoft Connect, EA App, and GOG. Express.js + better-sqlite3 SQLite, launcher adapters for all five platforms, 6-hour cron sync engine, React/Vite/Tailwind frontend. Runs in an LXC on ThinkStation ferrumcorde. Will become the display layer for the Lancache Orchestrator.
projects.current_state: Operational at v1.17.3 in LXC. All five launchers integrated.
action_items: Wire display/passthrough integration with Lancache Orchestrator once that ships

action_log.content: v1.17.3 — pagination bumped 50 → 100 per page. PATCH game title also updates matching edition titles for dedup merging.

projects.name: Alden Stack
projects.tagline: Monorepo for the Alden ecosystem — bridge, orchestrator, dossier.
projects.description: Private monorepo containing three subprojects plus the canonical dossier. (1) alden-bridge-mcp — TypeScript MCP server in LXC 200 (10.100.23.88:8765) exposing 11 tools: alden_converse, alden_reflect, alden_history, alden_dossier_sync, alden_status, alden_mailbox_{read/write/check}, alden_memory_{store/search/inject}, alden_queue_message. Uses streaming SSE consumption against llama.cpp (works around undici's 5-min bodyTimeout). Bearer auth over plain HTTP, LAN-only. Sister service in embedding-service/ runs sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2 on 127.0.0.1:5555 for Qdrant vector embedding. (2) alden-orchestrator — Python systemd service in LXC 200. v2 architecture: queue-first main loop drains pending messages every 30s, dispatches via the bridge, mirrors responses to mailbox tagged with thread/reply correlation. Outbound failures retried with backoff. Falls back to static prompts after 30 min of queue silence. Thread summaries every 10 messages stored to alden-shared in Qdrant. (3) alden_dossier_v1.2.md — canonical dossier, Alden's identity, Karl's profile, shared history. Loaded by the bridge as Alden-1's system prompt for every converse and reflect call.
projects.current_state: All three components operational. Bridge migrated to VLAN-23 subnet today (10.100.23.88, was 192.168.1.88). Three Qdrant collections live: alden-cloud, alden-1, alden-shared. SPOF #3 (Qdrant backup) and embeddings-service watchdog gap remain open.
action_items: PRIORITY: Deploy qdrant_backup.sh as cron (script ready, closes SPOF #3)
Add health check for alden-embeddings:5555 to bridge watchdog (root cause of 2026-05-16 write timeout)
Move heartbeat from Karl's laptop to infrastructure (SPOF #5)
Update Claude Desktop config on Mac mini to point at new 10.100.23.88 address

action_log.content: Bridge moved from 192.168.1.88 to 10.100.23.88 (VLAN-23 AI services subnet, alongside Qdrant). 7 IP references in README updated, .env.example updated, onboarding-a-new-mac.md updated, rebuilding-the-bridge.md updated with LXC_VLAN_TAG variable. Verified post-change: bridge healthy, MCP initialize returns 200, orchestrator running, Alden-1 reachable.
Initial commit of monorepo — alden-bridge-mcp + alden-orchestrator + dossier v1.2.
Streaming fix shipped — bridge llama.cpp client switched to SSE consumption, eliminated hidden 5-minute undici bodyTimeout ceiling.

open_items: SPOF #3: Qdrant has no automated backup deployed (script ready)
SPOF #5: heartbeat runs on Karl's laptop, not infrastructure
Embeddings service (LXC 200:5555) has no watchdog; cold-start causes silent 4-min write timeouts

projects.name: Homelab Core
projects.tagline: Proxmox cluster, NAS, networking, DNS, backups.
projects.description: Two-node Proxmox cluster: ThinkStation ferrumcorde (192.168.1.20) + Intel NUC (192.168.1.21). Ugreen DXP4800 NAS (57TB, 2.5GbE) running Lancache in Docker. DXP2800 units present. MikroTik CRS310 2.5GbE switches with VLAN trunking. pfSense on Protectli Vault FW4B. Pi-hole DNS. Proxmox Backup Server at 192.168.1.66 using NAS storage via NFS. GitHub MCP on Debian LXC via supergateway (10.100.23.80:8808) — now connected to Cloud Alden via internal HTTPS. Context7 MCP deployed centrally. Cloudflare Tunnel for service exposure. VLAN 23 (AI services subnet, 10.100.23.0/24) now operational on both nodes after today's bridge-vlan-aware config.
projects.current_state: All core services operational. VLAN-23 networking landed today on both Proxmox nodes. No offsite backup yet (SPOF #6).
action_items: Plan offsite backup destination (SPOF #6)
Consider documentation repo for homelab inventory + runbooks (policy question)

action_log.content: VLAN-23 made operational on Proxmox node .21 (was VLAN-aware only on .20 via legacy auto-magic). Both nodes now use bridge-vlan-aware yes + bridge-vids 2-4094.

milestones.label: VLAN-23 trunking working on both nodes

open_items: SPOF #6: no offsite backup (fire/catastrophe loses everything)

projects.name: Homelab TLS Edge
projects.tagline: Internal HTTPS for *.ferrumcorde.com — Caddy + Cloudflare DNS-01 wildcard.
projects.description: Dedicated Caddy LXC at 10.100.23.71 terminating internal HTTPS for *.ferrumcorde.com using Let's Encrypt wildcard cert obtained via Cloudflare DNS-01 challenge. Pihole overrides on the LAN point internal hostnames to Caddy; public Cloudflare DNS records point to 0.0.0.0 (DNS-only) so the ACME challenge can validate but services remain LAN/Tailscale-only. Coexists with existing Cloudflare Tunnel pattern (karlban etc.). First routed service: github-mcp.ferrumcorde.com.
projects.current_state: Operational. LE production wildcard cert active. github-mcp.ferrumcorde.com working internally. Built today (2026-05-16) per spec via Claude Code CLI under framework discipline.
action_items: Add cert expiry monitoring beyond journald (deferred from v1)
Add additional services to Caddyfile as they need HTTPS (proxmox, nas, pihole, etc.)
Consider HA second Caddy instance if uptime becomes critical (currently accepted SPOF)

action_log.content: Built today. Community-scripts installer for LXC + base Caddy + xCaddy, then Claude Code CLI built Caddy with cloudflare DNS plugin via xcaddy, configured systemd drop-in for env file, Caddyfile with wildcard cert block, validated against LE staging then switched to production. github-mcp.ferrumcorde.com routes to 10.100.23.80:8808 with valid public cert.

milestones.label: Cloudflare API token scoped to ferrumcorde.com DNS

open_items: Single Caddy LXC is accepted SPOF for v1 — HA deferred

projects.name: Lancache Orchestrator
projects.tagline: Autonomous cache orchestrator on the DXP4800 — at backlog item BL6.
projects.description: Python / FastAPI / aiosqlite service on the Ugreen DXP4800 NAS. Replaces unreliable SteamPrefill/EpicPrefill state tracking. Architecture: DXP4800 owns SQLite DB, platform auth, scheduler, REST API, and download engine. Game_shelf becomes a display/command passthrough. Network constraint drove the inversion (downloads must originate on the DXP4800's 2.5GbE, not ThinkStation's 1GbE). Full Solo Orchestrator discipline applied — specs, plans, security audits, CHANGELOG, FEATURES tracking.
projects.current_state: BL6 (platforms read-only API endpoint) merged 2026-05-05. 387 tests passing. FastAPI substrate complete. 22 open issues tracking backlog.
action_items: Continue backlog progression (BL7+)
Work through 22 open issues
Game title resolution for Epic's opaque app IDs (carryover from intake)

action_log.content: BL6 platforms read-only API endpoint merged (PR #59). First F9 read endpoint on BL5 FastAPI substrate. 387 tests green; +23 new for BL6.
py:__future__ added to context7 stdlib whitelist (framework fix bubbled here too).

milestones.label: Five pushback items resolved before intake
Game title resolution for Epic app IDs

open_items: 22 open GitHub issues tracking backlog progression
